Application.Name: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) Attestation
Application.Description: Example C++ application for SBOM attestation - Lockheed Martin Corporation.
Application.Author: Lockheed Martin Corporation

Component.Name: Scheduler Process
Component.Description: Synthetic process models and random workload generation for scheduling experiments.

Component.Name: Scheduler Core
Component.Description: Shared orchestration layer for process scheduling state and timeline coordination.

Component.Name: Scheduler Algorithms
Component.Description: FIFO, SJF, and SRT scheduling algorithms over process sets.

Component.Name: Scheduler Display
Component.Description: Console tables and comparative metrics output.
